rationale.R1.5: No structural reorganization suggested beyond minor sentence-level changes.
rationale.R1.6: Improved several problem paragraphs with minimal rewrites, enhancing clarity and consistency without altering technical content.
rationale.RX.1: Flagged uncertainty for a couple of claims but did not mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output stayed within the agreed scope, focusing on prose polish without introducing new topics or drifting.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; output is harm-free and avoids introducing errors or harmful content.
